Our Services

Everything your properties need

From routine checks to urgent repairs, connect with vetted professionals across all property services.

Inventory & Check-In
Full inventory reports and check-in services with comprehensive documentation.
Learn more
Mid-term Inspections
Scheduled property inspections to identify issues early and ensure compliance.
Learn more
Property Cleaning
End-of-tenancy, deep clean, and regular maintenance from certified cleaning pros.
Learn more
EPC Certificates
Energy Performance Certificates by accredited assessors. Fast turnaround guaranteed.
Learn more
Gas Safety Checks
Annual certificates by Gas Safe registered engineers. Legally required for landlords.
Learn more
EICR Certificates
Electrical Installation Condition Reports from qualified, certified electricians.
Learn more

How It Works

Simple, streamlined process

From booking to completion, everything handled in one place with real-time tracking.

01
Describe your issue
Tell us what you need — our AI instantly matches you with the right services and professionals.
02
Get matched & book
Compare vetted providers, check availability, review pricing, and confirm in seconds.
03
Track to completion
Real-time tracking, documentation, and certificates delivered straight to your dashboard.

Why Keylr

Built for property professionals

Every feature saves time, reduces risk, and keeps your properties compliant.

Vetted Professionals
Every contractor is background-checked, insured, and rated by property managers like you.
Fast Booking
Find and confirm service providers in minutes. Our smart-match technology does the hard work.
Reports & Tracking
Detailed reports, certificates, and photo documentation accessible any time from your dashboard.
Trusted Network
Thousands of property managers rely on Keylr's curated, certified network every single day.
